subcodes.first_line: O Ghaffar! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast recognized My Self and turned away from Mine enemies that are other than Me, and tribulations have touched thee in My path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: غفار طوبی لک بما عرفت نفسی و اعرضت عن سوائی من اعدائی و مستک الشداید فی
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude
